---
title: pip
---

```{css css_custom, code=readLines("_css_custom.css"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r knitr_config, code=readLines("_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```

*********************************************************************

## installation

### install

if you have installed python you should alredy have `pip`

### upgrade

```sh
# to upgrade pip
pip install -U pip setuptools
```

### check version
